items.name: Gammell, Stephen
items.text:
Stephen Gammell-inspired expressionist horror illustration.
Scratchy ink linework and rough graphite drawing.
Monochrome illustration.
Black ink on off-white or aged paper.
No color fills, no watercolor washes, no painted color.
Distorted anatomy and jittered linework.
Smeared edges and unstable form rendering.
Chaotic facial structure and organic visual distortion.
Psychological horror sketch aesthetic.
Raw expressive draft illustration.
Unstable perceptual rendering.
Not painterly.
Not color illustration.
Not digital painting.
